The course is fundamentally tertiary education (Target 4.3), developing skills for learning, global citizenship, and cultural diversity appreciation (Target 4.7) through English proficiency.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Develops skills for global partnership (Target 17.16) through 'cross-cultural communication', 'International Mobility', and the ability to 'critique the issues related to globalization'.
